title: Tâi-gí Telex Keyboard
subtitle: Type Taiwanese using Telex-style input for Tâi-lô romanization

input.label: Try it out:
input.placeholder: Type here... (e.g., tai[r] → tâi, tâi[f] → tâi-)

howItWorks.title: How Taiwanese Telex Works
howItWorks.description: This input method uses Vienameese Telex-style mechanism to type Tâi-lô's tones. Tonal marks can be placed either right after the vowel or at the end of each syllable.
